features: Rexona Non-stop protection deodorant stick cotton dry provides 72 hours of protection against sweat and body odour
Simply apply the refreshing anti-perspirant deodorant stick without alcohol (ethyl alcohol) and act confidently
The Rexona deodorant stick gives a slightly floral and subtle fragrance inspired by cotton
The Rexona Nonstop Protection Cotton Dry deodorant stick is a reliable partner for sports and other activities
Deodorant stick with patented technology that is gentle on the skin
The cotton dry deodorant stick from Rexona will not let anyone down
description: Product Description The Rexona Nonstop Protection deodorant stick cotton dry protects against sweat and odour for up to 72 hours. Thanks to the effective protection in the deodorant, you don't have to worry about underarm wetness and odour. The deodorant gives women a light, floral and subtle fragrance inspired by cotton. Long-lasting freshness and confident appearance every day with Rexona. The most important thing right at the beginning: sweating is something completely normal. This is due to the following reasons: high temperatures, sports activity, stress - in all these situations the body is cooled by sweating. Only 1% of the body sweat is under the armpits - but especially there, sweat odour and stains can become very unpleasant and annoying. Deodorants and anti-perspirants help here. And this is how it works: the active ingredients in anti-perspirants spread on the skin surface and form a kind of gel in combination with the body's own moisture. This lays over the sweat glands and thus provides 72 hours of reliable protection. Instructions for use: apply the Rexona anti-perspirant deodorant stick evenly and over the entire surface to clean and dry underarm skin. You are ready to start the day fresh, no matter how much you move. All Rexona products are designed to combat sweat problems and/or prevent body odour. Rexona is committed to learning as much as possible about the subject of sweating. All insights are then immediately incorporated into new, innovative product ideas to develop effective products. So no matter whether you want to climb a mountain or just running to the bus, an important lecture or a date is coming up, a Rexona deodorant works against the problems of perspiration. Rexona won't let you down Ingredients Ingredients: cyclopentasiloxane, stearyl alcohol, aluminium sesquichlorohydrate, PPG-14 butyl ether, C12-15 alkyl benzoate, paraffinum liquidum, glycine, hydrogenated castor oil, calcium chloride, talc, PEG-8 distearate, perfume, polyethylene, BHT, alpha-isomethyl ionone, benzyl alcohol. ate, benzyl salicylate, citronellol, geraniol, hexyl cinnamal, limonene, linalool. Directions Simply apply the deodorant stick and act confidently Safety Warning Be sure to use according to the manufacturer's instructions. If necessary, follow the warnings on the packaging. Manufacturer Contact Information 455, 3013 AL, NL See more
